title: How to Beat AI in Your Dev Job Search
summary: AWS Developers offers career guidance for developers in an AI-saturated job market, emphasizing networking, personal branding, and open source contributions over mass applications. The video argues that junior developers remain valuable and suggests practical steps like building projects and blogging to stand out.
writeup: AWS Developers addresses how developers can navigate a job market saturated with AI by prioritizing networking, personal branding, and open source contributions instead of submitting mass applications. The video makes the case that junior developers retain value and outlines concrete steps for standing out, including building projects and blogging. The central argument is that visibility and demonstrated work matter more than application volume.
